flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Golden West College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $11.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Golden West College rose 35% between 2007 and 2010 ($509 → $686).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Golden West College rose 31% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.1k → $4.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Golden West College fell 27% between 2009 and 2010 (8.9% → 6.5%).
